nasb.text: Consider now, for the Lord has chosen you to build a house for the sanctuary; be courageous and act.”

esv.text: Be careful now, for the Lord has chosen you to build a house for the sanctuary; be strong and do it.”

cnv.text: 現在你當謹慎，因為耶和華揀選了你建造殿宇，作為聖所；你要勇敢地去作。”

ccb.text: 现在你要谨慎，因为耶和华拣选你来建造殿宇作圣所。你要坚定不移地去做。”
